social.original_text: malir mein sab kuch doob gaya hai ghar mein pani aa gaya bachon ko bahar nikalo

contradiction_analysis.social_vs_weather: CONFLICT — Social reports severe flooding; weather shows 0mm rainfall and clear skies
contradiction_analysis.social_vs_traffic: CONFLICT — Social reports catastrophic conditions; traffic shows normal flow (2/10)
possible_explanations: Burst water main or sewage overflow (non-weather flooding)
Delayed/outdated social post from a previous event
Localized drainage failure not captured by broad telemetry

resource_recommendations: Dispatch ground verification team to Malir Halt before committing resources

emergency_ticket.hold_reason: Data contradiction detected. Awaiting operator review and ground verification.

safety_validation.escalation_reason: Strong social signal directly contradicts both weather and traffic telemetry. Cannot confirm or reject without human investigation. Possible non-weather flooding (e.g., water main break) or misinformation.
safety_validation.notes: ValidatorGate detects a clear contradiction: social urgency is very high but all telemetry sources show normal conditions. This is escalated to operator for ground-truth verification.
